channel.title: React Native on My cool new Blog
channel.description: Recent content in React Native on My cool new Blog

item.title: How I Scaffold a React Project
item.description: Scaffolding a project is perhaps one of the most important and common things to do during the early development stage. Depending on how a project is set up in the beginning can affect a project’s lifecycle and how things are maintained when the codebase starts growing larger. Using a boilerplate Most of the frontend React based projects I do start out by generating a barebones boilerplate using Facebook’s excellent and highly popular create-react-app.
